calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2026 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-29-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-17-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Dec-26-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, not contested, and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants Acquire.com Brokerage Services, Inc. and Acquire.com Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed and defendants presented sufficient evidence showing their entitlement to judgment in their favor and against plaintiff Paul Kelly.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff: Not Present. (301/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-26-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Mario Palencia, Esq. Jeffrey Ranen, Esq. 213-789-6549 Atticus Law Group for Plaintiff.
Tad Davlin, Esq. Mizeille Avina, Esq. 415-926-7600 Kaufman Dolowich LLP for Defendant Acquire.com
Court reporter: Noelia Espinola, CSR #8060, 408-375-4454, reported.

Argued. Defense counsel Ms. Avina contests the tentative ruling and argues. Plaintiff's counsel Mr. Ranen argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT ACQUIRE.COM BROKERAGE SERVICES, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Defendant Acquire,com Brokerage Services's motion to strike is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Noelia Espinola, CSR #8060, 408-375-4454, Reported. (301/JMQ)
